title: North Korea Conducts Fourth Missile Test with Cluster-Bomb Warheads
summary: Pyongyang launches fourth missile test on April 19. State media reports cluster-bomb warheads on weapons. Test underscores nuclear conviction amid global tensions.
contents:
## North Korea Conducts Fourth Missile Test with Cluster-Bomb Warheads

### Overview
Pyongyang launches fourth missile test on April 19. State media reports cluster-bomb warheads on weapons. Test underscores nuclear conviction amid global tensions.

### Event Details
North Korea executes fourth missile test of April on April 19, defying international norms. State-run media announces weapons carry cluster-bomb warheads, munitions prohibited by treaty ratified by over 120 countries. Days prior, regime unveils new destroyer *Choe Hyon* and fires strategic cruise missiles alongside anti-ship missiles. Actions extend strike capabilities beyond Korean Peninsula. Expert Dr. Ri Sotetsu analyzes hardening nuclear conviction in Pyongyang, complicating potential U.S. deals under Trump. Launches demonstrate resolve against external pressures, including post-Iran developments. Regime pushes advanced munitions development, showcasing cluster bombs despite bans. Destroyer test highlights naval expansion with precision-guided weapons. Analysts note tests signal rejection of freeze proposals. Washington anticipates phased negotiations: initial halt on nuclear and missile activities, followed by material reductions and inspections. Pyongyang dismisses such frameworks, prioritizes deterrence enhancements. Missile firings provoke regional alarms, prompt South Korean and Japanese monitoring. U.S. officials track trajectories, assess threat levels. Tests occur amid stalled inter-Korean dialogue, heighten DMZ tensions. North Korean leadership broadcasts successes via KCNA, rallies domestic support. International community condemns violations, urges restraint. Japan Forward reports details, cites expert insights on diplomatic hurdles. Events reinforce Pyongyang's military-first policy, challenge denuclearization efforts.

### Source Context
@the_koreaview (The Korea View) covers this category of developments. The account focuses on korean peninsula dprk rok missile test inter-korean dmz incident.
